reviews.review_description: 4 very basic games. The 4th game is a little nauseating. Graphics and gameplay passable for very low budget experiences.

This game is basically a rail ride shootemup
  I never thought I'd get spooked out pixilated enemies charging at you from all directions. The humanoid one was very disturbing with their squishy body noises and clumsy movements.  The skiing one... well I had to put that one aside because of my undeveloped VR legs and felt like I was going to lose my cookies.   As for gameplay, it plays just like it costs.  You shoot a couple of guns... thats it.  no more, no less.  It's kind of hard because a lot of the enemies take an insane amount of hit points before they go down.  

I'd say it was worth the money and I hope you add more levels or themes.

reviews.review_title: Great artwork with an amazing soundtrack
reviews.review_description: A nice rail shooter that converts my imagination from the gameboy/nes area into vr. I really dig the artwork and especially the chiptune soundtrack. This game proves, that pixelart is indeed possible in virtual reality.
Beautiful game we need more games like this wacky and weird
Played it, my favorite game is ski for thee, very silly and terrifying.
